title: Cron / Obsidian Tasks
content:

OS Component
Module

MIRROR_CHAMBER/M7 – Self‑ReferenceGEBMarkdown renderer that highlights self‑links.
Python + Graphviz
KERNEL_SPEC/M8 – OS FoundationsTanenbaum Modern OS (Sec.1‑4)
Draft service map (init, scheduler, fs).
Draw.io / Mermaid
